description_long: This table features a striking combination of geometric forms, with a rectangular base and a large circular marble top that partially overlaps the rectangle, creating a unique silhouette. The tabletop is made of polished marble with a mix of gray, white, and reddish-brown veining, giving it a luxurious and modern appearance. The table is supported by a minimalist black metal frame, consisting of four angular legs and a central circular support base, which adds both stability and visual interest. The marble surface is highly reflective and smooth, contrasting with the matte black metal structure. The design is contemporary and would stand out in urban environments such as modern parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor cafes. There are no visible drawers, handles, or attached seating, emphasizing its clean, functional form.
description: A modern table with a circular marble top intersecting a rectangular base, supported by a black metal frame. The marble features gray, white, and reddish-brown veining, and the design is sleek and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular and circular marble top, with the black metal frame and central support clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the table and the way the circular marble top extends beyond the rectangular base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the marble's veining and the symmetry of the metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the circular extension of the marble top and the sturdy metal support structure.
attribute_number_of_legs: four angular metal legs with a central circular support
